positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for picuris_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~in(picuris_mountains,texas)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    new_mexico != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    mountain_range(picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != texas).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != new_mexico).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    new_mexico != harding_pegmatite_mine).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    donated(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    juan_de_onate != harding_pegmatite_mine).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    texas != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~has_mine(X0,X1) | ~in(X0,texas) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1)).

cnf(u29,negated_conjecture,
    ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~in(X0,texas) | ~mountain_range(X0)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != harding_pegmatite_mine).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    texas != harding_pegmatite_mine).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

    new_mexico != harding_pegmatite_mine).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    texas != juan_de_onate).

    texas != harding_pegmatite_mine).

    mountain_range(picuris_mountains)).

    ~has_mine(X0,X1) | ~in(X0,texas) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != harding_pegmatite_mine).
